title: Deliciously Dense Turkish Cheese Bake
description: A comforting Turkish dish featuring a blend of cheeses and Mediterranean spices, perfect for a sick day or a cozy evening in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the crumbled feta cheese, shredded kasseri cheese, and softened cream cheese, mixing until well combined.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mirin, hon dashi, and eggs until smooth.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture, stirring until a thick batter forms.
Stir in the chopped parsley, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add the flour to the cheese mixture, stirring until a dense dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
